Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.predicate

Class AbstractContext

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.predicate.AbstractContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
IContext
public class AbstractContext extends Object implements IContext
This class represents a context. Information stored in a context are information that are needed to parse a sequent and that are completed by the builder for each sequent.

      public void load(ISimpleSequent sequent)

      Loads the given sequent in this context.

      Parameters:

    • load

    • getPredicateLoader

      private PredicateLoader getPredicateLoader(Predicate predicate, Predicate originalPredicate, boolean isGoal)

    • load

      public void load(Predicate predicate, boolean isGoal)
      Description copied from interface: IContext
      Loads the given predicate in this context.

      If isGoal is true, the predicate will be loaded as a goal (negated).

      Specified by:
      load in interface IContext
      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate to load
      isGoal - true iff the predicate should be loaded as a goal

      public List<INormalizedFormula> getResults()
      Description copied from interface: IContext
      Returns a list containing the normalized formula of each predicate that has been loaded into this context.

      getResults in interface IContext
      Returns:
      a list of all normalized formulas of the loaded predicates
